metadata.description: Input variables for the BVIF Monte Carlo simulation. Edit values and re-run montecarlo_simulation.py to recalculate.
metadata.initiative: Predictive maintenance using AI (Precision Furniture Inc.)
metadata.iterations: Number of Monte Carlo iterations (higher = more stable results, 10000 is recommended)
metadata.triangular_distribution: Each three-point estimate uses a triangular distribution: [pessimistic, most_likely, optimistic]
metadata.adoption_rate: Percentage of theoretical value that will actually be realized given organizational adoption (0.0 to 1.0)
metadata.counterfactual: Where the metric would land in 12 months WITHOUT the AI initiative (based on historical trend extrapolation)

adoption_rate.description: Shared across all metrics — represents organizational readiness to adopt and use AI recommendations
adoption_rate.source: Stakeholder estimates: Maintenance Director (pessimistic), VP Operations (most likely), best-case assumption (optimistic)

metrics.name: Recovered production capacity (unplanned downtime reduction)
metrics.counterfactual_note: 324 current hours × (3.0% / 2.8%) — projected from 8-quarter deterioration trend

improvement_target.description: Percentage reduction in unplanned downtime hours from counterfactual
improvement_target.source: WMIA benchmarks (pessimistic), peer case studies at 12-18 months (most likely), best-in-class with full sensor coverage (optimistic)

metrics.name: Maintenance cost reduction
metrics.counterfactual_note: Trending from $12.00 at ~$0.50/year based on 2-year 10.6% increase
metrics.annual_units_note: Annual production volume from scenario document

improvement_target.description: Percentage reduction in maintenance cost per unit from counterfactual
improvement_target.source: Finance Director estimate (pessimistic), peer case studies (most likely), best-in-class elimination of reactive costs (optimistic)

metrics.name: Delivery penalty avoidance
metrics.counterfactual_note: Trending down from 90.0% at ~1pp/year based on 2.4pp decline over 2 years

improvement_target.description: Absolute percentage points improvement in OTD from counterfactual
improvement_target.source: CRO estimate (pessimistic), calculated from Metric 1 × 68% root cause (most likely), full downtime + scheduling improvement (optimistic)
